lessons.name: Unit 9: World Englishes
lessons.description: Learn about World Englishes with defining relative clauses.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
English varieties: British English, American English, Australian English, Indian English, Singapore English, accent, dialect, pronunciation, vocabulary, spelling

Language learning: fluent, fluency, native speaker, non-native speaker, bilingual, multilingual, communicate, understand, practice, improve

Language skills: speaking, listening, reading, writing, grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, intonation, stress

Global English: international, global, worldwide, universal, lingua franca, official language, second language, foreign language

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about English varieties, language learning, and global communication.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Defining Relative Clauses (Mệnh đề quan hệ xác định)

A. Khái niệm:

  • Mệnh đề quan hệ xác định: cung cấp thông tin cần thiết để xác định danh từ
  • Không có dấu phẩy
  • Không thể bỏ mệnh đề này
  • Ex: The book that I bought is interesting. (xác định cuốn sách nào)

B. So sánh với mệnh đề không xác định:

  • Xác định (Defining): không có dấu phẩy, cần thiết
  • Ex: The student who studies hard will pass. (học sinh nào?)
  • Không xác định (Non-defining): có dấu phẩy, bổ sung thông tin
  • Ex: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. (đã biết anh trai nào)

C. Đại từ quan hệ trong mệnh đề xác định:

  • who/that: người (chủ ngữ)
  • Ex: The man who/that speaks English well is a teacher.
  • whom/that: người (tân ngữ) - có thể bỏ
  • Ex: The woman (whom/that) I met speaks three languages.
  • which/that: vật (chủ ngữ hoặc tân ngữ)
  • Ex: The book which/that teaches English is useful.
  • Ex: The book (which/that) I read was interesting.
  • whose: sở hữu
  • Ex: The student whose English is good will win.
  • where: nơi chốn
  • Ex: The country where English is spoken is the UK.
  • when: thời gian
  • Ex: The time when we learn English is important.

D. Khi nào có thể bỏ đại từ quan hệ:

  • Có thể bỏ khi làm tân ngữ:
  • Ex: The book (which/that) I read was good.
  • Ex: The woman (whom/that) I met was friendly.
  • Không thể bỏ khi làm chủ ngữ:
  • Ex: The man who/that speaks English is a teacher. (không thể bỏ)

E. Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ:

  • 1. Dùng V-ing (chủ động):
  • Ex: The man who speaks English → The man speaking English
  • 2. Dùng V3/ed (bị động):
  • Ex: The book which was written by him → The book written by him
  • 3. Dùng to-infinitive:
  • Ex: The first person who came → The first person to come

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Mệnh đề quan hệ xác định với Who/That
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • who/that cho người
  • Không có dấu phẩy
  • Cần thiết để xác định

examples.question: The man ______ speaks English well is a teacher.
examples.solution: The man who/that speaks English well is a teacher.
examples.explanation: who/that thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ), mệnh đề xác định

examples.question: The student ______ studies hard will pass.
examples.solution: The student who/that studies hard will pass.
examples.explanation: who/that (chủ ngữ), xác định học sinh nào

examples.question: The woman ______ I met speaks three languages.
examples.solution: The woman (whom/that) I met speaks three languages.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Mệnh đề quan hệ xác định với Which/That
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • which/that cho vật
  • Không có dấu phẩy
  • Xác định vật nào

examples.question: The book ______ teaches English is useful.
examples.solution: The book which/that teaches English is useful.
examples.explanation: which/that (chủ ngữ), xác định cuốn sách nào

examples.question: The book ______ I read was interesting.
examples.solution: The book (which/that) I read was interesting.

examples.question: The language ______ is spoken worldwide is English.
examples.solution: The language which/that is spoken worldwide is English.
examples.explanation: which/that (chủ ngữ), xác định ngôn ngữ nào

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • V-ing: chủ động
  • V3/ed: bị động
  • to-infinitive: the first, the only, the last

examples.question: The man who speaks English → The man ______.
examples.explanation: Rút gọn: who speaks → speaking (chủ động)

examples.question: The book which was written by him → The book ______.
examples.explanation: Rút gọn: which was written → written (bị động)

examples.question: The first person who came → The first person ______.
examples.explanation: Rút gọn: who came → to come (sau the first)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Phân biệt xác định và không xác định
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Xác định: không dấu phẩy, cần thiết
  • Không xác định: có dấu phẩy, bổ sung

examples.question: The student who studies hard will pass. (xác định hay không xác định?)
examples.solution: Xác định (Defining) - không có dấu phẩy, cần thiết để biết học sinh nào.
examples.explanation: Không có dấu phẩy → mệnh đề xác định

examples.question: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. (xác định hay không xác định?)
examples.solution: Không xác định (Non-defining) - có dấu phẩy, bổ sung thông tin.
examples.explanation: Có dấu phẩy → mệnh đề không xác định

examples.question: The book that I bought is interesting. (có thể bỏ 'that' không?)
examples.solution: Có thể bỏ - vì 'that' làm tân ngữ. → The book I bought is interesting.
examples.explanation: 'that' làm tân ngữ → có thể bỏ

exercises.question: The man ______ speaks English well is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: who thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: The book ______ teaches English is useful.
exercises.explanation: which thay thế cho vật (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: The student ______ studies hard will pass.
exercises.explanation: who thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: The book ______ I read was interesting.
exercises.explanation: which thay thế cho vật (tân ngữ)

exercises.question: The woman ______ I met speaks three languages.
exercises.explanation: whom thay thế cho người (tân ngữ)

exercises.question: The country ______ English is spoken is the UK.
exercises.explanation: where = nơi chốn

exercises.question: The student ______ English is good will win.
exercises.explanation: whose = sở hữu

exercises.question: The man who speaks English → The man ______ English.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who speaks → speaking

exercises.question: The book which was written by him → The book ______ by him.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: which was written → written

exercises.question: The first person who came → The first person ______.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who came → to come (sau the first)

exercises.question: Which are defining relative clauses? (Select all that apply)
options: The man who speaks English is a teacher.
My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
The book that I read was good.
London, which is in England, is big.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: không có dấu phẩy (xác định). Sai: có dấu phẩy (không xác định)

exercises.question: Which relative pronouns can be omitted? (Select all that apply)
options: The man who is a teacher. (who)
exercises.explanation: Có thể bỏ khi làm tân ngữ: which I read, whom I met. Không thể bỏ khi làm chủ ngữ: who speaks, who is

exercises.question: Which are correct reduced relative clauses? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: speaking (V-ing), written (V3), to come (to-V). Sai: speak (thiếu -ing)

exercises.question: Fill in: The man ______ speaks English well is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: who/that thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: Fill in: The book ______ I read was interesting.
exercises.explanation: which/that thay thế cho vật (tân ngữ, có thể bỏ)

exercises.question: Reduce: The man who speaks English → The man ______.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who speaks → speaking

exercises.question: Reduce: The book which was written by him → The book ______.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: which was written → written

exercises.question: Rearrange: man / The / who / speaks / English / well / is / teacher / a / . / book / The / which / teaches / English / is / useful / .
exercises.sample_answer: The man who speaks English well is a teacher. The book which teaches English is useful.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: mệnh đề quan hệ xác định với who (người) và which (vật)

exercises.question: Combine: The man is a teacher. The man speaks English well. → The man ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The man who/that speaks English well is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: dùng who/that thay thế cho 'the man'

exercises.question: Reduce: The student who studies hard will pass. → The student ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The student studying hard will pass.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who studies → studying (V-ing chủ động)

exercises.question: Rearrange and reduce: man / The / who / speaks / English / → / man / The / ______ / English / . / book / The / which / was / written / by / him / → / book / The / ______ / by / him / .
exercises.sample_answer: The man who speaks English → The man speaking English. The book which was written by him → The book written by him.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who speaks → speaking; which was written → written

exercises.question: Combine and reduce: The woman speaks three languages. The woman teaches English. I met the woman. → The woman ______ and ______ is ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The woman (whom/that) I met, who speaks three languages and teaches English, is... / The woman speaking three languages and teaching English, whom I met, is...
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp nhiều mệnh đề: whom I met (tân ngữ), who speaks (chủ ngữ), who teaches (chủ ngữ). Có thể rút gọn: speaking, teaching
